summary: Client-side encryption library for Hadoop FileSystems (HDFS, S3). Provides seekable AES encryption/decryption of data streams with per-file symmetric keys wrapped via public/private key encapsulation. Supports AES/CTR/NoPadding and AES/CBC/PKCS5Padding with optional OpenSSL native acceleration. Three modules: crypto-core (cipher primitives and seekable I/O), crypto-keys (key material management and serialization), hadoop-crypto (EncryptedFileSystem wrapper for Hadoop).

apiSurface.name: CryptoStreamFactory
apiSurface.description: Static factory for creating encrypting OutputStreams and decrypting SeekableInputs/InputStreams. Transparently selects OpenSSL-backed or JCE cipher implementation.

apiSurface.name: SeekableCipher
apiSurface.description: Cipher abstraction that supports seeking to arbitrary byte offsets for random-access decryption. Methods: initCipher, seek, getKeyMaterial, getBlockSize.

apiSurface.name: SeekableCipherFactory
apiSurface.description: Factory for creating SeekableCipher instances and generating KeyMaterial for supported algorithms.

apiSurface.name: KeyMaterial
apiSurface.description: Immutable value object holding a SecretKey and initialization vector (IV) for symmetric encryption.

apiSurface.name: KeyStorageStrategy
apiSurface.description: Strategy interface for persisting per-file KeyMaterial. Methods: put(fileKey, keyMaterial), get(fileKey), remove(fileKey).

apiSurface.name: AsyncKeyStorageStrategy
apiSurface.description: Asynchronous variant of KeyStorageStrategy returning CompletableFuture for put/get/remove operations.

apiSurface.name: EncryptedFileSystem
apiSurface.description: Hadoop FileSystem wrapper that transparently encrypts on create and decrypts on open. Delegates key management to a KeyStorageStrategy. Does not support append or recursive delete.

apiSurface.name: StandaloneEncryptedFileSystem
apiSurface.description: Self-contained EncryptedFileSystem configured via Hadoop core-site.xml properties (fs.efs.key.public, fs.efs.key.private). Usable as a drop-in Hadoop FileSystem via URI scheme e[FS-scheme].

apiSurface.name: FileKeyStorageStrategy
apiSurface.description: KeyStorageStrategy that stores wrapped symmetric keys as sidecar files alongside encrypted data files on the Hadoop FileSystem.

architecturePatterns.description: Each file encrypted with a unique symmetric key; the symmetric key is itself encrypted with an RSA public/private key pair and stored as a sidecar file. This is the standard envelope encryption pattern used for data-at-rest.

KeyStorageStrategy interface decouples key persistence from the crypto layer. Implementations include FileKeyStorageStrategy (sidecar files), ChainedKeyStorageStrategy (fallback chain), and async variants.
EncryptedFileSystem extends DelegatingFileSystem to wrap any Hadoop FileSystem, intercepting open/create/rename/delete to inject encryption transparently without changing client code.
CryptoStreamFactory auto-detects OpenSSL availability for AES-NI hardware acceleration, falling back to JCE if unavailable. Uses Apache Commons Crypto for the native path.
SeekableCipher interface allows random-access decryption by seeking the cipher to arbitrary byte offsets, critical for efficient reads on large encrypted files in Hadoop.

typeDefinitions.name: KeyMaterial
typeDefinitions.description: Immutable value (via Immutables library) holding symmetric key material for a single encrypted file.

typeDefinitions.name: KeyStorageStrategy
typeDefinitions.description: Interface for per-file key material CRUD operations keyed by file path.
